author: firfre
name: Fixed-Stride H-Net (stride=8, m2-T6-m2) + Muon + torch.compile

training.optimizer: Muon (2D matrix params) + AdamW (embeddings, scalars, head)

technique_summary: Hierarchical byte-level language model with fixed stride (stride=8) instead of learned dynamic routing. Encoder: 2-layer Mamba2 at byte level. Chunk transformer: 6-layer causal self-attention at word level (1/8 sequence length). Decoder: 2-layer Mamba2 at byte level. Causal upsample with residual connection. Muon optimizer for 2D weight matrices, AdamW for embeddings/scalars. torch.compile for training speedup. int6+brotli11 compression.
